A-B-M Experiment: Autonomous vs Fixed-Schedule Mode Switching

Empirical test of the Dupoux/LeCun/Malik A-B-M architecture (arXiv 2603.15381) on MiniGrid-DoorKey-6x6. System A = LeWM (~1.5M params, trains from pixels). System B = PPO. System M = autonomous plateau-detect FSM vs fixed-schedule timer.

Results Summary

ConditionSteps to 80%Peak successMode switchesWall time
Autonomous System M (plateau-triggered) not reached 68.0% 10 9830s
Fixed-schedule System M (every 1000 steps) 355,008 92.0% 16 9744s
PPO baseline (raw pixels, no LeWM) 375,008 90.0% 0 2795s

Figure 1 — Learning Curves

Figure 2 — Mode Switch Timeline (Autonomous)

Figure 3 — SSL Loss (LeWM training)
